case_title: STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ALICIA RENEE KAFKA ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100014156) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS
DECLARATION RE: SUPERIOR COURT FILING ( CCP 1033) (TRANSACTION ID # 100023194) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-02-2016 CONTINUED TO APR-13-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100023194) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-18-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KAFKA, ALICIA RENEE DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-02-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-28-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-08-2016
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100021878) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT [DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERETO] (TRANSACTION ID # 100012218), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JAN-06-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KAFKA, ALICIA RENEE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( CCP 585(D)) (TRANSACTION ID # 100023194) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 100015789) AS TO DEFENDANT KAFKA, ALICIA RENEE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-13-2016 CONTINUED TO JUL-13-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-18-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JUL-13-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $309.45 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100023194) AS TO DEFENDANT KAFKA, ALICIA RENEE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAFKA, ALICIA RENEE $7,519.63 PRINCIPAL, $309.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,829.08, PER COURT INTEREST DENIED UNDER CIVIL CODE 3287 (C) SEE SCANNED DOC
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100025105) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KAFKA, ALICIA RENEE
